docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DATTNER, ALICIA AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDFARB, LYNNORE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
